companyNameZh: 流体暖通工程有限公司

categories.summaryZh: 用于商用楼宇和工业厂房的暖通核心设备。
categories.summaryEn: Core HVAC equipment for commercial buildings and industrial facilities.

categories.summaryZh: 用于管路系统的阀门、执行器和控制组件。
categories.summaryEn: Valves, actuators, and control components for piping systems.

products.name: HVAC Centrifugal Chiller
products.description: High-efficiency centrifugal chiller for large commercial and industrial HVAC systems, featuring advanced compressor technology and energy-saving design.

defaultFields.application: Commercial buildings, data centers, industrial facilities

products.name: Air Handling Unit (AHU)
products.description: Modular air handling unit with customizable configurations for ventilation, heating, cooling, and air filtration in various building types.

products.name: Industrial Cooling Tower
products.description: Heavy-duty cooling tower designed for industrial HVAC applications, with corrosion-resistant materials and efficient heat dissipation.

products.name: VAV Terminal Unit
products.description: Variable air volume terminal unit for precise zone control in HVAC systems, with integrated damper and airflow measurement.

products.name: Ball Valve
products.description: Full-port ball valve for fluid control applications, with durable construction and bubble-tight shutoff capability.

products.name: Pressure Reducing Valve
products.description: Automatic pressure reducing valve for maintaining consistent downstream pressure in fluid systems, with adjustable set point.

defaultFields.application: Water supply systems, HVAC hydronic systems

products.name: Thermal Expansion Valve
products.description: Precision thermal expansion valve for refrigeration systems, providing accurate superheat control and efficient operation.

products.name: Strainer
products.description: Y-type strainer for pipeline protection, removing debris and particles from fluid systems to prevent equipment damage.

defaultFields.application: Water systems, HVAC piping, industrial processes

products.name: Packaged Rooftop Unit
products.description: Complete packaged rooftop HVAC unit with integrated heating, cooling, and ventilation components for easy installation.

products.name: Check Valve
products.description: Swing check valve for preventing backflow in fluid systems, with low pressure drop and reliable operation.

defaultFields.application: Pump discharge, HVAC systems, water lines
